meta.purpose: Normalized benefit mapping across all B-1/B-2 plans. Enables apples-to-apples comparison for Phase 24 ranking. Every value traces to an evidence.json record.
meta.note: Atlas_America has only L4/L5 docs — all its values are NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW. All other plans are L1 Certificate or L2 Policy Wording.

CoverAmerica_Gold.carrier: Sirius Specialty Insurance Corporation (publ) [now SiriusPoint — 2021 cert not updated]
CoverAmerica_Gold.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — carrier name in document is pre-rebrand

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian Branch

VisitorSecure.carrier: TMHCC(CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
VisitorSecure.plan_type: SCHEDULED BENEFIT — fixed dollar amounts per service, NOT comprehensive major medical
VisitorSecure.flag: CRITICAL — Scheduled/indemnity plan. Caps per service regardless of actual cost. Do not compare directly to comprehensive plans.

Atlas_America.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — full Certificate not obtained. All values from Confirmation of Coverage (L4) + brochure (L5).

INF_Elite_X.plan_type: Comprehensive — with actual pre-existing condition coverage (not just acute onset)
INF_Elite_X.flag: KEY DIFFERENTIATOR — covers actual pre-existing conditions. Cancer and mental health EXCLUDED.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.carrier: Crum & Forster SPC (via ITI SP segregated portfolio)
SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.plan_type: Comprehensive (labeled 'Limited Benefit, Short Duration' = short-term/non-ACA designation, not indemnity structure)

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.carrier: Crum & Forster SPC (via ITI SP segregated portfolio)
SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.plan_type: Comprehensive (labeled 'Limited Benefit, Short Duration' = short-term/non-ACA designation)
SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.flag: NOT RENEWABLE. Upgrade tier above Basic.

VisitorSecure.value: Plan A $50K / Plan B $75K / Plan C $100K / Plan D $175K (age 14d–69)
VisitorSecure.flag: SCHEDULED BENEFIT — these are aggregate caps; individual services capped separately

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: Same tiers as under-70 (no explicit reduction stated)
Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — verify age-band reduction

VisitorSecure.value: Plan A $50K / Plan B $75K / Plan C $100K (age 70–79)

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not clearly stated for age 80+

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW

VisitorSecure.value: Plan A $10K / Plan B–D NOT AVAILABLE (age 80+)

INF_Elite_X.value: $75K (age 70–99; no separate 80+ reduction stated)

deductible_options.canonical_name: Deductible Options (per Period of Coverage / per Injury/Sickness)

CoverAmerica_Gold.flag: Minimum $100 deductible — no $0 option unlike IMG plans

VisitorSecure.flag: SCHEDULED BENEFIT — deductible per period, applied before fixed benefit amounts

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: 100% in-network

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: 100% everywhere (no PPO distinction)

VisitorSecure.value: N/A — scheduled benefit; UHC Options PPO used for discounts but no coinsurance split

INF_Elite_X.value: 80% or 90% (plan pays); insured pays 10% or 20%
INF_Elite_X.flag: IMPORTANT — NOT 100% in-network. INF has ongoing coinsurance even in-network.

Patriot_America_Plus.value: 90% (insured pays 10%); OOP max $500 per Period of Coverage

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: 80% (insured pays 20%); OOP max $1,000
CoverAmerica_Gold.flag: Weaker than IMG Patriot Plus (90%) and Platinum (100%)

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: 100% everywhere (no out-of-network penalty)

VisitorSecure.value: N/A — scheduled benefit plan; UHC PPO for discount access only

INF_Elite_X.value: 60% or 70% (plan pays); insured pays 30% or 40%
INF_Elite_X.flag: CRITICAL WEAKNESS — 30-40% out-of-pocket out-of-network. Highest OOP exposure of all plans.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: 80% of first $10K Covered Expenses, then 100%; effective OOP max $2,000

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: 90% of first $10K Covered Expenses, then 100%; effective OOP max $1,000

Patriot_America_Plus.value: Injury: 100% in-network, 90% OON. Illness: same + $250 extra deductible per ER visit for illness

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: 100% everywhere. Illness: $250 extra deductible per ER visit for illness

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: Standard coinsurance applies; no extra ER deductible noted

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: 100% up to Medical Maximum; $200 extra deductible per ER visit for illness (not injury)

VisitorSecure.value: $375–$785 fixed (must be admitted to hospital); no benefit if not admitted
VisitorSecure.flag: SCHEDULED BENEFIT — admission required; very limited

Atlas_America.value: $200 co-payment per ER visit for illness

INF_Elite_X.value: Hospital ancillary (includes ER): capped at $20,000 total; no separate ER copay stated

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: URC up to Medical Maximum; $100 copay per ER visit

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: URC up to Medical Maximum; $100 copay per ER visit

Patriot_America_Plus.value: Covered: 100% in-network, 90% OON, 100% international. No visit cap stated in evidence.
Patriot_America_Plus.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — no visit/dollar cap confirmed from Certificate

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: Covered: 100% everywhere. No visit cap stated in evidence.
Patriot_America_Platinum.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — no visit/dollar cap confirmed from Certificate

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: Covered: 100% in-network, 80% OON. Requires medical order or treatment plan.
CoverAmerica_Gold.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — no visit/dollar cap confirmed from Certificate

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: $50/visit, max 10 visits ($500 total). Must be prescribed by Physician. 1 visit/day.

VisitorSecure.value: $40/visit, max 12 visits. Fixed dollar amounts per visit.

INF_Elite_X.value: $50/visit, max $500 total (10 visits). Very limited.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: EXCLUDED — Physiotherapy and Chiropractic Care completely excluded

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: $50/visit, max 10 visits ($500 total). Must be prescribed by Physician.

Patriot_America_Plus.value: $1,000,000. Must be coordinated by Company. In-network 100%, OON 90%.

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: Up to full Period of Coverage limit (e.g., $8M if $8M plan). Highest of all plans.

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: $1,000,000 — INCLUDES pre-existing conditions (unique among all plans reviewed)
CoverAmerica_Gold.flag: KEY FEATURE — pre-existing included in evacuation

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: 100% up to $1,000,000. Acute Onset evacuation: up to $25,000.

VisitorSecure.value: $50,000 lifetime max. ONLY for members under age 70.

INF_Elite_X.value: $25,000 maximum. Lowest of all plans reviewed.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: $250,000 (separate from Medical Maximum). Must be arranged by Seven Corners Assist.

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: $500,000 (separate from Medical Maximum). Must be arranged by Seven Corners Assist.

acute_onset_age_under70.canonical_name: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age Under 70
acute_onset_age_under70.note: INF Elite X does not use acute onset — it covers pre-existing conditions directly. Listed as N/A here.

Patriot_America_Plus.value: Up to full Period of Coverage limit (e.g., $1M if $1M plan). Age <70 required. 30-day stability, 24-hr treatment.
Patriot_America_Plus.flag: BEST acute onset among comprehensive plans

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: Non-US citizens: $1,000,000 (age ≤69). US citizens: tiered by whether they have primary health plan.

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: Up to full Period of Coverage limit EXCEPT cardiac: $36,000 sub-limit for angina/heart attack/stroke (age ≤69).

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: Up to Medical Maximum EXCEPT cardiac/stroke: $25,000 sub-limit (age ≤69). Overall acute onset benefit is Medical Maximum.

VisitorSecure.value: Subject to scheduled benefit amounts per service type. Effective acute onset coverage is very limited.
VisitorSecure.flag: SCHEDULED BENEFIT — actual payout far less than headline

INF_Elite_X.value: N/A — INF covers actual pre-existing conditions directly (not acute onset model). Pre-ex max: $25K–$50K.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: $25,000 total (age 14d–69). 7-day waiting period. No cardiac-specific sub-limit.

acute_onset_age_70_79.canonical_name: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age 70–79

Patriot_America_Plus.value: NOT COVERED — acute onset only available for insured persons under age 70

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: NOT COVERED — acute onset only available for insured persons under age 70

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: Total $30,000 (age 70–79). Cardiac NOT covered age 70+.
CoverAmerica_Gold.flag: Only plan with named 70–79 acute onset tier among comprehensive plans

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: $35,000 (age 70+). Cardiac/stroke sub-limit: $15,000 (age 70+).

VisitorSecure.value: Subject to reduced scheduled benefit amounts; significantly limited

INF_Elite_X.value: Pre-ex covered directly: $20K max (age 70–99). Not acute-onset model.

acute_onset_age_80_plus.canonical_name: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age 80+

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: NOT COVERED (age 80+)

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: $20,000 (age 80+). Cardiac/stroke sub-limit: $15,000.
Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.flag: ONLY plan with acute onset coverage for age 80+

VisitorSecure.value: NOT COVERED age 80+ for acute onset specifically

INF_Elite_X.value: Pre-ex covered directly: $20K max (age 70–99). Applies at 80+.

preexisting_condition_coverage_model.note: Documents whether the plan covers pre-existing conditions at all, and in what form.

Patriot_America_Plus.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset (up to plan max, age <70). 3-year lookback.

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset ($1M for non-US citizens age ≤69). 3-year lookback.

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset (plan max with cardiac sub-limits). 3-year lookback.

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset (Medical Maximum with cardiac sub-limits). 3-year lookback.

VisitorSecure.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset (within scheduled benefit limits).

INF_Elite_X.value: ACTUALLY COVERED — $25K–$50K max (age 0–69), $20K (age 70–99). Separate deductible. Sub-limits per service type. EXCEPTION: Stable medication (no change in 24 months) = NOT pre-existing.
INF_Elite_X.flag: KEY DIFFERENTIATOR — only plan that covers actual pre-existing conditions, not just acute onset

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset ($25K age ≤69). 36-month lookback. Chronic conditions with expected flare-ups EXCLUDED from acute onset.

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: EXCLUDED except Acute Onset (cardiac $50K / other $75K, age ≤69). 36-month lookback. Chronic conditions with expected flare-ups EXCLUDED from acute onset.

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: 3 years (36 months)

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: 3 years (36 months)

VisitorSecure.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not explicitly stated in Description of Coverage

INF_Elite_X.value: No explicit lookback period — pre-ex defined as any condition for which advice/treatment received before Effective Date. EXCEPTION: stable medication 24 months = not pre-existing.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: 36 months. Includes conditions where 'reasonable medical certainty' existed even if undiagnosed.
SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.flag: 'Reasonable medical certainty' clause is broad — can capture undiagnosed conditions

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: 36 months. Same broad definition including 'reasonable medical certainty'.

Patriot_America_Plus.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — Certificate says 'approved list of independent PPO providers'; network name not explicitly stated

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — same as Plus

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — network name not confirmed from Certificate

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — network name not confirmed from Certificate

VisitorSecure.value: UnitedHealthcare Options PPO (confirmed from ID card). Payer ID: USN01.

Atlas_America.value: UnitedHealthcare Options PPO (confirmed from ID card). Payer ID: USN01.
Atlas_America.flag: Confirmed from ID card but full cert not obtained

INF_Elite_X.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — network not named in Policy Wording

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — 'PPO Network' referenced but not named in Certificate

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — 'PPO Network' referenced but not named in Certificate

Patriot_America_Plus.value: Covered — treated as any Eligible Medical Expense. No waiting period.

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: Covered — treated as any Eligible Medical Expense.

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: Covered BUT requires 30 days initial coverage purchase. COVID-19 NOT covered on shorter trips.

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: Covered — no waiting requirement. COVID-19, SARS-CoV-2, and any mutation covered up to Medical Maximum.

VisitorSecure.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not confirmed from Description of Coverage

Atlas_America.value: Covered — same as any illness per brochure

INF_Elite_X.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not explicitly mentioned in Policy Wording

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: Covered — URC up to Medical Maximum. No waiting period.

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: Covered — URC up to Medical Maximum. No waiting period.

Patriot_America_Plus.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not addressed in evidence extracted

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not addressed in evidence extracted

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not addressed in evidence extracted

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: Mental/Nervous Disorder: $2,500 per Period of Insurance (sub-limit)

VisitorSecure.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW

INF_Elite_X.value: EXCLUDED — Mental Health Disorders explicitly excluded

Patriot_America_Plus.value: Covered if new condition during trip — not a pre-existing condition
Patriot_America_Plus.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — confirm no cancer-specific exclusion

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: Covered if new condition during trip

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not confirmed

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — not confirmed

VisitorSecure.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW

INF_Elite_X.value: EXCLUDED — 'any condition directly or indirectly related to or caused by cancer' excluded
INF_Elite_X.flag: CRITICAL — even new cancer diagnosis during trip excluded

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: Covered if new condition during trip (no cancer-specific exclusion found)
SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — verify no cancer exclusion in full exclusions section

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: Covered if new condition during trip (no cancer-specific exclusion found)

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: 5 days to 12 months. Extension available.

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: Up to 364 days maximum. Cannot have resided in USA >365 days prior.

VisitorSecure.value: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — maximum duration not confirmed from evidence

INF_Elite_X.value: Up to 364 days from date of Covered Accident/Sickness. Benefits period = 364 days.

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.flag: NOT RENEWABLE — one fixed period only

Patriot_America_Plus.value: SiriusPoint carrier (A-). Up to $1M max. 90% OON coinsurance. Strong acute onset (plan max). Up to 24-month duration.

Patriot_America_Platinum.value: 100% coinsurance everywhere. Evacuation = plan max (up to $8M). Teladoc included. Best-in-class for high net worth visitors.

CoverAmerica_Gold.value: B-1/B-2 visa required (others just need non-resident status). Evacuation includes pre-existing. Border Entry Protection $550. Flu vaccination covered.

Safe_Travels_USA_Comprehensive.value: No PPO penalty (100% everywhere). $20K acute onset for age 80+. $2,500 mental health sub-limit. Well Doctor Visit $125. Zurich carrier (AA rated).

VisitorSecure.value: SCHEDULED BENEFIT — fixed dollar caps. UHC PPO confirmed. Best for young/healthy travelers who just need catastrophic coverage at low premium.

Atlas_America.value: UHC PPO confirmed. 100% coinsurance. $200 ER co-payment. NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW for full details.

INF_Elite_X.value: Only plan covering actual pre-existing conditions (not just acute onset). Stable medication exception. BUT: low evacuation ($25K), no cancer, no mental health, high OON exposure (30-40%).

SC_Travel_Medical_Basic.value: No PT. $25K acute onset. 7-day waiting period. NOT RENEWABLE. Best as entry-level price option for healthy travelers.

SC_Travel_Medical_Choice.value: $75K non-cardiac acute onset. $500K evacuation. PT included. Better OON coinsurance (90%). Upgrade path from Basic with meaningful improvements.
